goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the attraction' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'international' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the east
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same area as the attraction and should be in the cheap price range
The restaurant should serve international food
Make sure you get phone number
